title: Navgrah Chalisa
intro: Shri Navgrah Chalisa: Full Path, Meaning, and Benefits - Hymn to Navgrah
description:
|| Shri Navagraha Chalisa ||

|| Doha ||
Shri Ganpati gurupad kamal
Prem sahit sirnaay
Navagraha Chalisa kahat
Sharad hot sahay
Jai jai Ravi Shashi Som
Budh jai Guru Bhrugu Shani raaj
Jayati Rahu aru Ketu graha
Karahun anugrah aaj

|| Chaupai ||
Prathamhi Ravi kaham naavau matha
Karahun kripa jani jaani anatha
He Aditya Divakar Bhanu
Main mati mand maha agyanu
Ab nij jan kaham harahu kalesha
Dinkar dwadash roop Dinesha
Namo Bhaskar Surya Prabhakar
Ark Mitra agh mogh kshamakar
Shashi Mayank Rajanipati Swami
Chandra Kalanidhi namo namami
Raakapati Himanshu Rakesha
Pranavat jan tan harahun kalesha
Som Indu Vidhu shanti sudhakar
Sheet rashmi aushadhi nishakar
Tumhin shobhit sundar bhaal Mahesha
Sharan sharan jan harahun kalesha
Jai jai jai Mangal sukhdata
Lohit Bhaumadik vikhyata
Angarak Kuj ruj rinhari
Karahun daya yahi vinay hamari
He Mahisut Chitisut sukhraashi
Lohitang jai jan aghnashi
Agam amangal ab har lijai
Sakal manorath pooran kijai
Jai Shashi Nandan Budh Maharaja
Karahu sakal jan kaham shubh kaaja
Dijai buddhi bal sumati sujaana
Kathin kasht hari kari kalyana
He Tarasut Rohini Nandan
Chandrasuvan dukh dwandva nikandan
Poojahin aas daas kahum Swami
Pranat paal Prabhu namo namami
Jayati jayati jay Shri Gurudeva
Karun sada tumhari Prabhu seva
Devacharya tum Dev Guru gyani
Indra purohit vidyadani
Vachaspati Bagish udara
Jeev Brihaspati naam tumhara
Vidya sindhu Angira naama
Karahun kal vidhi pooran kaama
Shukra Dev pad tal jal jaata
Daas nirantan dhyan lagata
He Ushana Bhargava Bhrugu Nandan
Daitya purohit dusht nikandan
Bhrugukul bhushan dushan hari
Harahun nesht graha karahun sukhari
Tuhi dwijbar Joshi sirtaja
Nar shareer ke tumhi raja
Jai Shri Shanidev Ravi Nandan
Jai Krishno Souri jagvandan
Pingal Mand Raudra Yam naama
Vapra aadi konasth lalama
Vakra drishti Pippal tan saaja
Kshan maham karat rank kshan raja
Lalat swarn pad karat nihala
Harahun vipatti chhaya ke lala
Jai jai Rahu gagan pravisaiya
Tumhi Chandra Aditya grasaiya
Ravi Shashi ari Swarbhanu dhara
Shikhi aadi bahu naam tumhara
Saihimkey tum nishachar raja
Ardhakaay jag rakhahu laaja
Yadi graha samay pay him aavahu
Sada shanti aur sukh upajavahu
Jai Shri Ketu kathin dukh-hari
Karahu sujan hit mangalkari
Dhwajyut rund roop vikarala
Ghor raudratan aghman kala
Shikhi tarika graha balwan
Maha pratap na tej thikana
Vahan meen maha shubhkari
Dijai shanti daya ur dhari

|| Navagraha Shanti Phal ||
Tirathraj Prayag supasa
Basai Ram ke sundar dasa
Kakra gramahim pure-Tiwari
Durvasashram jan dukh hari
Navagraha shanti likhyo sukh hetu
Jan tan kasht utaran setu
Jo nit path karai chit laavai
Sab sukh bhogi param pad paavai

|| Doha ||
Dhanya Navagraha Dev Prabhu
Mahima agam apar
Chit nav mangal mod grih
Jagat janan sukhdwar
Yah Chalisa Navograha
Virachit Sundardas
Padhat prem sut badhat sukh
Sarvanand hulasa
meaning:
|| Shri Navagraha Chalisa ||

|| Doha ||
Shri Ganpati gurupad kamal, Prem sahit sirnaay.
I bow with love to the lotus feet of Lord Ganesha and my Guru.
Navagraha Chalisa kahat, Sharad hot sahay.
I recite the Navagraha Chalisa, may Mother Sharada assist me.
Jai jai Ravi Shashi Som, Budh jai Guru Bhrugu Shani raaj.
Victory to the Sun, Moon, and Soma (Moon); Victory to Mercury, Jupiter, Venus, and King Saturn.
Jayati Rahu aru Ketu graha, Karahun anugrah aaj.
Victory to planets Rahu and Ketu, may you bestow your grace upon me today.

|| Chaupai ||
Prathamhi Ravi kaham naavau matha, Karahun kripa jani jaani anatha.
First, I bow my head to the Sun, please show mercy on me, knowing me to be helpless.
He Aditya Divakar Bhanu, Main mati mand maha agyanu.
O Aditya, Divakar, Bhanu (names of Sun), I am slow-witted and greatly ignorant.
Ab nij jan kaham harahu kalesha, Dinkar dwadash roop Dinesha.
Now remove the troubles of your devotee, O Dinkar, the twelve-formed Dinesha.
Namo Bhaskar Surya Prabhakar, Ark Mitra agh mogh kshamakar.
Salutations to Bhaskar, Surya, Prabhakar, Ark, and Mitra; you are the forgiver of sins.

Shashi Mayank Rajanipati Swami, Chandra Kalanidhi namo namami.
O Shashi, Mayank, Lord of the night, O Chandra, the ocean of arts, I bow to you.
Raakapati Himanshu Rakesha, Pranavat jan tan harahun kalesha.
O Raakapati, Himanshu, Rakesha, remove the bodily troubles of those who bow to you.
Som Indu Vidhu shanti sudhakar, Sheet rashmi aushadhi nishakar.
O Som, Indu, Vidhu, the peace-giving nectar-rayed one, O cool-rayed lord of medicines and night.
Tumhin shobhit sundar bhaal Mahesha, Sharan sharan jan harahun kalesha.
You adorn the beautiful forehead of Lord Mahesh (Shiva); remove the troubles of those seeking your refuge.

Jai jai jai Mangal sukhdata, Lohit Bhaumadik vikhyata.
Victory to the giver of happiness, Mars; you are famous as Lohit and Bhaum (Earth-born).
Angarak Kuj ruj rinhari, Karahun daya yahi vinay hamari.
O Angarak, Kuj, remover of diseases and debts, please be merciful, this is my prayer.
He Mahisut Chitisut sukhraashi, Lohitang jai jan aghnashi.
O son of Earth (Mahisut/Chitisut), you are a storehouse of happiness; victory to Lohitang, the destroyer of devotees' sins.
Agam amangal ab har lijai, Sakal manorath pooran kijai.
Remove the upcoming misfortunes and fulfill all my desires.

Jai Shashi Nandan Budh Maharaja, Karahu sakal jan kaham shubh kaaja.
Victory to the son of the Moon, King Mercury; make all deeds of the people auspicious.
Dijai buddhi bal sumati sujaana, Kathin kasht hari kari kalyana.
Give me intelligence, strength, and good sense, O wise one; remove difficult troubles and bless me.
He Tarasut Rohini Nandan, Chandrasuvan dukh dwandva nikandan.
O son of Tara and Rohini, O Chandrasuvan (son of Moon), you are the destroyer of sorrows and duality.
Poojahin aas daas kahum Swami, Pranat paal Prabhu namo namami.
Your servant prays to you with hope, O Lord; I bow to you, O protector of the surrendered.

Jayati Jayati jay Shri Gurudeva, Karun sada tumhari Prabhu seva.
Victory to Shri Gurudeva (Jupiter); I shall always perform your service, O Lord.
Devacharya tum Dev Guru gyani, Indra purohit vidyadani.
You are the teacher of the gods, the wise Guru of gods, the priest of Indra, and the giver of knowledge.
Vachaspati Bagish udara, Jeev Brihaspati naam tumhara.
You are Vachaspati and generous Bagish; your names are Jeev and Brihaspati.
Vidya sindhu Angira naama, Karahun kal vidhi pooran kaama.
You are the ocean of knowledge, named Angira; fulfill my tasks at the right time.

Shukra Dev pad tal jal jaata, Daas nirantan dhyan lagata.
I offer water at the feet of Shukra Dev, your servant constantly meditates on you.
He Ushana Bhargava Bhrugu Nandan, Daitya purohit dusht nikandan.
O Ushana, Bhargava, son of Bhrugu, O priest of the demons and destroyer of the wicked.
Bhrugukul bhushan dushan hari, Harahun nesht graha karahun sukhari.
O ornament of the Bhrugu dynasty, remover of faults, remove the inauspicious effects and make me happy.
Tuhi dwijbar Joshi sirtaja, Nar shareer ke tumhi raja.
You are the best of Brahmins and the crown jewel of astrologers; you are the king of the human body.

Jai Shri Shanidev Ravi Nandan, Jai Krishno Souri jagvandan.
Victory to Shri Shanidev, son of the Sun; victory to the dark-complexioned Souri, worshipped by the world.
Pingal Mand Raudra Yam naama, Vapra aadi konasth lalama.
You are known by the names Pingal, Mand, Raudra, and Yama; you are supreme, positioned in the corners.
Vakra drishti Pippal tan saaja, Kshan maham karat rank kshan raja.
With your crooked glance, you reside in the Peepal tree; in an instant, you turn a pauper into a king and vice-versa.
Lalat swarn pad karat nihala, Harahun vipatti chhaya ke lala.
You delight those who bow to your golden feet; O son of Chhaya, remove my misfortunes.

Jai jai Rahu gagan pravisaiya, Tumhi Chandra Aditya grasaiya.
Victory to Rahu, who enters the sky; you are the one who swallows the Moon and Sun.
Ravi Shashi ari Swarbhanu dhara, Shikhi aadi bahu naam tumhara.
You are the enemy of Sun and Moon, named Swarbhanu; Shikhi is one of your many names.
Saihimkey tum nishachar raja, Ardhakaay jag rakhahu laaja.
O Saihimkey (son of Simhika), you are the king of demons; O Ardhakaay (half-bodied), protect the honor of the world.
Yadi graha samay pay him aavahu, Sada shanti aur sukh upajavahu.
If you arrive at the destined time, then always generate peace and happiness.

Jai Shri Ketu kathin dukh-hari, Karahu sujan hit mangalkari.
Victory to Shri Ketu, the remover of difficult sorrows; act auspiciously for the benefit of the good.
Dhwajyut rund roop vikarala, Ghor raudratan aghman kala.
You have a flag and a fierce headless form; you have a terrifying aspect that destroys sins.
Shikhi tarika graha balwan, Maha pratap na tej thikana.
You are Shikhi, the star-planet, the powerful one; you are greatly valiant and your brilliance has no limit.
Vahan meen maha shubhkari, Dijai shanti daya ur dhari.
Your vehicle is the fish, which is very auspicious; please grant me peace with mercy in your heart.

|| Navagraha Shanti Phal ||
Tirathraj Prayag supasa, Basai Ram ke sundar dasa.
Near Prayag, the king of pilgrimages, lives a beautiful devotee of Ram.
Kakra gramahim pure-Tiwari, Durvasashram jan dukh hari.
In Kakra village resides Pure-Tiwari; the Durvasa Ashram is the remover of people's sorrows.
Navagraha shanti likhyo sukh hetu, Jan tan kasht utaran setu.
This Navagraha Shanti (Chalisa) is written for the sake of happiness; it is a bridge to remove human suffering.
Jo nit path karai chit laavai, Sab sukh bhogi param pad paavai.
One who recites this daily with focus, enjoys all happiness and attains the supreme state.

|| Doha ||
Dhanya Navagraha Dev Prabhu, Mahima agam apar.
Blessed are the Navagraha lords; your glory is unfathomable and immense.
Chit nav mangal mod grih, Jagat janan sukhdwar.
Nine types of auspiciousness and joy reside in your thoughts; you are the gateway to happiness for the world.
Yah Chalisa Navograha, Virachit Sundardas.
This Navagraha Chalisa is composed by Sundardas.
Padhat prem sut badhat sukh, Sarvanand hulasa.
Reading this with love increases happiness, bringing joy and ecstasy to all.

faq.q1: Why is the Navgrah Chalisa recited?
faq.a1: The Nine Planets (Navgrahas) deeply influence our lives. This Chalisa is recited to pacify the malefic effects of planets (Doshas), strengthen planetary positions in one's horoscope, and bring balance and harmony to life.
faq.q2: Should one consult an astrologer before starting to read it?
faq.a2: No, that is not necessary. The Navgrah Chalisa is a prayer that any devotee can recite to attain peace and positive energy in their life.
faq.q3: What is the best time to recite the Navgrah Chalisa?
faq.a3: You can recite it at any time. Especially if you are going through mental stress or a challenging phase, daily recitation is considered very effective.
faq.q4: Does it help in removing hardships?
faq.a4: Yes, it is believed that regular recitation reduces the negative energy of the planets, removes obstacles, and provides the strength to make better life decisions.
faq.q5: Is any special ritual material required for this?
faq.a5: No, no special materials are needed. Simply reciting it with a pure mind and concentration, while lighting a ghee lamp, is sufficient.
